notes.body: CO2: Check your CO2 levels. If below 25%, call and place an order now — supplier may be short on supply. All locations should have a 50 lb backup tank; if you don't have one, call to order. Standing: hold the schedule under 25% labor.

Manager Certifications 2065: all three MITs passed — Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98. Temporary certificates issued; training videos fixed. Standing KPI: 60% of score = Secret Shops + Customer complaints + Ticket times.
Opened all three manager exams with a 4-day time limit; temporary certificates issued once scores were in (Rusul 100, Anthony 99, Madelynn 98).
Temp probe 'connected but not taking reading' ticket open 4 days with no reply — auto-closes in 4 more. Reseat/replace probe, confirm reporting, reply to the ticket.
New hire Javeh Goodman is processed and good to schedule. In directory (from 7/10). Phone still PENDING.

Weekly sales +18.4% W/W ($21,666 vs $18,305 LY). COGS Flash (wk ending 7/12): CGS $3,888, CP% 17.9, FP% 20.6. Open CT tasks (7/10): confirm receivings BOSS Alpha–Ohio Valley (bread) + Performance Foodservice; close L-Rev and Location Transfer In.
